items.name_cn:
H-Hermès Steeple 🌈
Style:『Tote Shopping Bag』
The soulful shape crafted by the artisan's hand is a signature style you'll remember at first glance❤️‍🔥
A people-oriented philosophy dedicated to environmental protection, featuring natural imported canvas material. Stylish and practical~ You have to get one~ Various pattern designs!
Rest assured, you won't be overwhelmed by the choices. Each piece is a boutique, each unique~
Size: 28, 28.5, 17cm

items.name_en: 《Grey Military Green》CHANEL🚩🚩 Oversized logo suede double-pocket chain ⛓️ bag, airport shopping bag! This brown double-pocket bag is really special 🤩. The dusty green overall look has a great vibe. It feels very cool when worn! Definitely a viral aesthetic bright color. The inner small cowhide feels super soft and chewy. Easy to grab and go, super nice. Chanel Flirt is the one! Can take it home~! Like its simple, casual, and free-spirited style. This color double-pocket bag is so beautiful! The material feels like a mix of suede and leather, not as soft as pure suede, but not hard either, just right. This color is also great for grandma's outfits 😍😍 Size: 34x25x10cm

items.name_en: Midnight Black OHANEL🚩🚩 Oversized logo suede double pocket chain bag! This brown double pocket bag is really special🤩, the black overall body has a great vibe, and it looks very cool when worn! Definitely the king of trendy bright colors. The calfskin material feels super soft and smooth, ready to grab and go, super nice. Chanel Chance really delivers! You can take it away~! I love its simple, casual, and free-spirited style. This color double pocket bag is really beautiful! The material feels like a combination of suede and leather, not as soft as pure suede, but not as hard either, just right. This color is also very good for matching with clothes😍😍 Dimensions: 34x25x10cm

items.name_en: Oversized logo 🚩🚩 French Coffee ☕️ Color. Very practical. OHANEL Vintage custom cowhide. The real thing is super retro and looks great, a favorite for autumn and winter. In my heart, it is firmly number one because it is so unique and rare. The cocoa coffee brown double pocket chain bag is a must-have for sisters 👭. It combines the calfskin, large bag, adjustable chain, and silver buckle—these major perfect elements. Similar styles have been released many times, but this suede brown is the one that hits me the most. The leather looks like cowhide texture but feels like thick matte suede. The chain can be worn as a crossbody bag. Lightweight, can fit a computer + iPad! Dimensions: 34x25x10cm
